/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_client_with.description: A person examines a plate of green peas through a magnifying glass, inspecting and analyzing the contents with focused attention.

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_client_with.metaphor: Detailed inspection, quality control, thorough analysis, due diligence, or careful examination of business processes and details

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_customer_su.description: A professional man stands contemplatively before a wall covered with interconnected notes, sketches, photographs, and red lines representing complex relationships and project management.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_customer_su.subject: person
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_customer_su.metaphor: Strategic thinking and complex problem-solving; navigating interconnected business challenges and project workflows

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_busy_o.description: A golden octopus in business attire sits at a desk juggling multiple tasks and documents, symbolizing multitasking and workload management in a professional environment.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_busy_o.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_busy_o.metaphor: Multitasking professional managing multiple responsibilities; visual representation of capacity, delegation, or the complexity of modern business operations

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_huge_wareho.description: An oil painting of a vast warehouse corridor lined with towering shelves filled with colorful documents and files, with a solitary figure walking through the center toward a distant light.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_huge_wareho.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_huge_wareho.metaphor: Information overload, navigating complexity, data management, bureaucracy, persistence through challenges, finding clarity amid chaos

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_support_man.description: A support manager wearing a headset stands pensively against a weathered wall with orange "HELP ME" graffiti, embodying the pressure and emotional weight of customer service work.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_support_man.subject: person
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_support_man.metaphor: The burden of customer support and the cry for assistance in overwhelming situations; the weight of being responsible for helping others while struggling oneself

/images/paintings/Leadtime_abstract_impr.description: An exhausted figure watches sand slip through an hourglass in an oil painting, symbolizing the pressure of time and deadlines.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_abstract_impr.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_abstract_impr.metaphor: Time pressure, deadline management, urgency, the race against time in business projects

/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_stress.description: A stressed octopus in business attire sits at a cluttered desk, juggling multiple telephone handsets while surrounded by office chaos and papers.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_stress.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_A_very_stress.metaphor: Multitasking overload and the chaos of managing multiple demands simultaneously in a professional environment; represents business complexity and operational overwhelm

/images/paintings/Leadtime_An_exhausted_.description: An exhausted consultant sits at a desk surrounded by chaotic notes, sticky notes, and tangled red wires, representing overwhelming workload and mental strain.

/images/paintings/Leadtime_An_exhausted_.metaphor: Information overload, burnout, complexity management, project chaos

/images/paintings/Leadtime_abstract_impr.description: A team of business professionals gathered around a glowing crystal sphere, rendered in impressionist oil painting style with warm and cool tones blending together.

/images/paintings/Leadtime_abstract_impr.metaphor: Stalled progress, abandoned projects, failure to launch, crisis management, or overcoming obstacles in business

/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.metaphor: New ventures navigating challenging urban landscapes; emerging growth finding its path through established systems; vulnerability and resilience in business environments

/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.description: An impressionist oil painting depicting multiple cars stuck in congested traffic on a dusty mountain road, surrounded by rocky terrain and green landscape.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.metaphor: Gridlock, congestion, and the impediment of progress; represents bottlenecks in business processes, blocked momentum, or obstacles to growth

/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.description: An impressionist oil painting depicting a melting pocket watch rendered in surrealist style, evoking Salvador Dalí's famous work on the passage and fluidity of time.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.metaphor: The melting clock represents the fluidity of time management, deadlines dissolving, or the need to adapt business strategies. Could symbolize the transformation of traditional business thinking or how time pressures reshape organizational structure.

/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.description: An oil painting depicting a massive flock of sheep blocking a highway filled with congested traffic, with a lone shepherd managing the herd amid waiting vehicles and hazy urban landscape in the background.
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.subject: metaphor
/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.metaphor: Obstruction, unexpected disruption, natural forces overcoming modern systems, the importance of patience and adaptation in business, managing chaos and stakeholders

/images/paintings/Leadtime_impressionist.description: A vintage biplane flying through a misty, atmospheric sky with warm golden light breaking through cool blue fog.
